LocaleLayout.title: DraftReady · InterviewScript
LocaleLayout.description: Your AI interview strategist — compliant prep before the interview.

Nav.addRoundTitle: Add another round (up to {max}). New rounds may start empty—add your own questions.
Nav.removeRoundTitle: Remove round {n} and all its questions
Nav.removeRoundConfirm: Remove round {n}? All questions in this round will be deleted permanently.

UserMenu.settingsBody: More account controls are coming soon.
UserMenu.supportBody: Reach us via in-app feedback or email if you need help.
UserMenu.privacyBody: We use your data only to power interview preparation — not live interview assistance.
UserMenu.privacyPageP1: DraftReady / InterviewScript helps you prepare before interviews: you can paste a résumé and job description, then use AI-assisted tools to organize questions, refine answer drafts, and maintain per-question scripts. This policy explains how we handle information about you and what you can expect regarding privacy.
UserMenu.privacyPageP2: Account and project data: projects, question lists, chat history, and script text you create while signed in are stored in our cloud infrastructure (e.g. database and object storage) and are tied to your account. We do not sell this content to third parties for unrelated advertising, except where required by law or with your clear consent.
UserMenu.privacyPageP3: AI and model providers: when you use features that call a large language model (question generation, chat refinement, image-to-questions, etc.), the necessary text—such as prompts, your messages, and limited résumé/JD excerpts needed for context—is sent to the AI service we configure to produce a response. We aim to minimize what is transmitted and retain it only as long as needed to operate the product reliably.
UserMenu.privacyPageP4: Compliance and intended use: this product is for pre-interview practice and material organization only. We prohibit and design against use for live cheating, real-time answering on your behalf, or similar misuse. We may restrict or terminate accounts that clearly abuse the service.
UserMenu.privacyPageP5: Cookies and local storage: we may store session tokens and locale preferences in your browser so you stay signed in and see the right language. You can clear site data in your browser settings; you may need to sign in again afterward.
UserMenu.privacyPageP6: Your rights and contact: you can manage, export, or delete project content inside the app. For account deletion or other data requests, use in-app feedback or our support channel. If you have questions about this policy, contact us the same way and we will respond within a reasonable time.
UserMenu.billingDescZh: WeChat Pay and other local methods may be added later. Preview only — no real charges.
UserMenu.billingDescEn: Card checkout may arrive later. Preview only — no real charges.

Landing.heroSub: Master your next move with intelligence that understands human conversation — before you walk into the room.
Landing.j1Body: Ground the model in your real materials.
Landing.j2Body: Match score, focus areas, and question mix.
Landing.j3Body: Questions, iteration chat, and living transcript.
Landing.ctaBottomSub: Join thousands of engineers and managers who prepare with intention.
Landing.ctaBottomNote: No credit card required. First session is on us.
Landing.footerTagline: Human-centered intelligence for the modern professional.

Auth.loginSub: Sign in to continue to your projects.
Auth.registerSub: Start preparing with a calm, editorial workspace.
Auth.name: Display name
Auth.complianceNote: DraftReady supports interview preparation only — not live interview assistance.
Auth.confirmEmail: This account still needs email verification (often because it was created while confirmation was required). Check your inbox, or delete the unconfirmed user under Supabase → Authentication → Users and try again.
Auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
Auth.registerNoSessionHint: This email may already be registered — try signing in. If the password fails, reset or delete the user in the Supabase dashboard.

Projects.title: My Projects
Projects.subtitle: Review your past sessions and keep sharpening your narrative.
Projects.emptyHint: When you finish Prep and enter Workspace, your session appears here.
Projects.deleteConfirm: Delete this session and all its questions and chat? This cannot be undone.
Projects.deleteFailed: Could not delete this session. Please try again.
Projects.deleteUnauthorized: Please sign in again to delete.

Support.title: Feedback & bugs
Support.intro: Tell us what broke or what would help. Submissions are saved to your account for our team to review.
Support.messagePlaceholder: What happened, what you expected, steps to reproduce…

errors.generic: Could not send. Please try again.

Prep.resumePlaceholder: Paste or edit your resume summary…
Prep.strategicBody: Based on your resume and JD, you align with approximately {score}% of the stated core requirements.
Prep.confirmHint: Generates a new batch and appends it to your list—existing questions stay put. Edit, reorder, or delete in the workspace.
Prep.apiKeyMissing: Add GEMINI_API_KEY to web/.env or web/.env.local, then restart dev.
Prep.insufficientCredits: Not enough credits for this AI action.
Prep.disclaimer: Estimates are model-generated; not the employer’s view.
Prep.removeRoundFailed: Could not remove that round. Please try again.
Prep.removeRoundLast: At least one interview round must remain.

Workspace.addQuestionFormatHint: Write the interview question in plain text — that’s what the AI reads when you practice.
Workspace.addQuestionAiScopeNote: With a screenshot or longer pasted text, we run one AI pass (1 credit): OCR, split multiple questions, and assign topic tags. You can still click a tag to fix it. Short single-line questions skip that pass and default to “Other”. Chat is text-only — no images in the input.
Workspace.pasteScreenshotHint: Press {shortcut} to paste a screenshot, or paste anywhere in the box above.
Workspace.draftPlaceholder: Type or paste a custom question…
Workspace.extractNoQuestions: Couldn’t find interview questions in that image or text. Try clearer text or a tighter crop.
Workspace.extractNeedInput: Add some text or a screenshot first.
Workspace.extractModelError: The model returned an unexpected format. Please try again.
Workspace.extractFailed: Could not extract questions. Please try again.
Workspace.exportDialogHint: Choose how to order sections in the file. You can re-export anytime with a different layout.
Workspace.exportSortByRoundSub: Sections: Round 1, Round 2…; good when you prep round-by-round.
Workspace.exportSortByTopicSub: Groups: resume deep-dive, technical, soft skills…; good for one full prep document.
Workspace.exportScopeAllSub: Export every round in this project with scripts and titles.
Workspace.exportScopeCurrentRoundSub: Export only the round selected in the top bar—handy for single-round review.
Workspace.chatNoImages: Images aren’t supported in chat — use text only.
Workspace.chatPlaceholder: Ask AI to refine your response…
Workspace.scriptTextareaPlaceholder: Edit your script here (Markdown ok). Selecting a question on the left scrolls here.
Workspace.insufficientCredits: Not enough credits for this AI action.
Workspace.emptySession: No session data. Start from Prep.
Workspace.workspaceLoadFailed: Could not load this workspace. Check your connection and try again.
Workspace.workspaceProjectMissing: This project was not found or you don’t have access to it.
Workspace.workspacePartialLoad: Some data could not be loaded (questions or chat history). You can keep working here — refresh if something looks missing.
Workspace.complianceLine: Interview preparation only — not live interview assistance.
Workspace.selectQuestion: Select a question on the left to start iterating.
Workspace.emptyRound: No questions in this round yet.
Workspace.placeholderScript: When you’re happy with a reply, use “Save to script” or select text and “Import selection”; the panel shows cleaned text per question.
Workspace.importNeedSelection: Select some text in the chat first.
Workspace.importNoAssistant: No AI reply to import yet.
Workspace.fileTypeUnsupported: Use an image or a .txt file.
Workspace.deleteQuestionConfirm: Delete this question? Its chat history will be removed too.
Workspace.addRoundFailed: Could not add a round. Please try again.
Workspace.removeRoundFailed: Could not remove that round. Please try again.
Workspace.removeRoundLast: At least one interview round must remain.
